title: Rebind Quick Swap
description: Allows you to rebind the quick swap (holding shift and clicking in the inventory)
body:
Rebind Quick Swap!

This mod allows you to rebind the quick swap feature in your inventory. By default minecraft has it hard coded to left shift, but with this mod you can change the keybind to any keyboard/mouse button you want. --- **Keybind** This keybind can be set to any key, including mouse buttons. ![Keybind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd95092c06eeaaf72f8f8fa957e0ab1b811dddf0_0.webp)
